# PERF-165 positive: rows.Scan into a primitive followed by manual conversion
lang: go
file: PERF-165-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"strconv"
)

type MyID int64

func LoadID(rows *sql.Rows) (MyID, error) {
	var raw string
	if err := rows.Scan(&raw); err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}
	n, err := strconv.ParseInt(raw, 10, 64)
	if err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}
	return MyID(n), nil
}
